features.name: unpacked memory array with parameterized dimensions
features.description: Code should include a memory array declared as unpacked array where both width and depth are parameterized

features.name: indexed part select on unpacked array element
features.description: Code should include indexed part select access on an unpacked memory array element for byte-level or bit-level operations

features.name: bit-masked memory write with for loop
features.description: Code should include a for loop iterating over memory width bits with conditional write enable based on write mask

features.name: always_ff with read-write multiplexer
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block with a write enable multiplexer that selects between read and write operations
